flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 62% at Remington College-Dallas Campus vs the 2018–2022 baseline (208 vs 551).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Remington College-Dallas Campus fell 50% between 2020 and 2023 (66.7% → 33.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Remington College-Dallas Campus fell 41% between 2021 and 2024 (427 → 250).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Remington College-Dallas Campus fell 38% between 2020 and 2023 (60.6% → 37.6%).
